title: Fixed-Point FFT for Embedded Vibration Analysis
content: A 64-point radix-2 Cooley-Tukey FFT on 16-bit Q15 integers runs in approximately 0.8 ms at 16 MHz AVR. Magnitude is approximated as max(|Re|,|Im|) + 0.4*min(|Re|,|Im|) — the L1 norm with ~5% error vs true magnitude — eliminating the sqrt() call. The dominant frequency bin identifies machine fault harmonics. Overall complexity is O(N log N) with N=64.
